data.title: Airwallex wins 3 awards at 2025 Asia Fintech Awards, including Banking Tech, Best Employer, and Director of the Year.
data.description: A global financial platform, Airwallex, emerged victorious at the Asia FinTech Awards 2025 held in Singapore, securing three prestigious accolades. The company achieved a remarkable feat by winning three awards, namely Banking Tech of the Year, Best Employer of the Year, and Director of the Year for Arnold Chan, the General Manager of Asia Pacific. This remarkable hat-trick of awards sets Airwallex apart as the sole recipient of such recognition among numerous contenders. The Asia FinTech Awards is renowned for honoring excellence in the fintech sector, making Airwallex's achievement significant.

data.title: PCI Biotech from Oslo, reports half-year 2025 results on 29 Aug. (OSE: PCIB) with financial figures enclosed.
data.description: Oslo, Norway - On August 29, 2025, PCI Biotech (OSE: PCIB) released its interim report for the first half of 2025. The report, along with a presentation, has been made available to the public.

data.title: Solana's SOL spiked 4% surpassing Bitcoin and Ethereum in market cap, gaining $77 million in corporate reserves.
data.description: Solana (SOL) performed exceptionally well in the cryptocurrency market on Thursday, surpassing cryptocurrencies with larger market caps following substantial purchases by DeFi Development Corp. (DFDV). DFDV is demonstrating strong momentum in its movements. SOL saw a significant increase of nearly 4%, making it the highest gainer among major cryptocurrencies in the past day. In contrast, Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) experienced slight declines of 0.13% and 0.91% respectively. As the sixth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, SOL broke through a key price barrier from February, reaching a peak of $216. This surge stimulated the derivatives market, as open interest in SOL futures surged by 10% to reach an all-time high of $13.96 billion, as reported by Coinglass. For more details, one can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Scientific Industries shifts focus, raises $10M, sells Genie® Division to Troemner, LLC to boost two data-driven platforms.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that sales of electric vehicles (EVs) soared by 72% in the first quarter of this year compared to the same period last year. A total of 420,000 electric vehicles were sold worldwide in the last three months. This increase in sales is attributed to various factors, such as government incentives, a wider selection of EV models, and increasing awareness about environmental issues. The growth in EV sales is a positive sign for the industry's trajectory towards a more sustainable transportation sector. This surge also reflects a shifting trend towards cleaner energy sources in the automotive market. With more consumers opting for electric vehicles, there is an evident rise in the market share of EVs compared to traditional internal combustion engine vehicles. The data indicates a significant shift towards electric mobility and highlights the increasing preference for eco-friendly transportation options globally.

data.title: Mowi ASA's ex-dividend of NOK 1.45 is effective today.
data.description: The latest data indicates that there has been a significant increase in the number of coronavirus cases in the past week, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported. This brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 100,000. Additionally, the number of deaths related to COVID-19 has risen to 1,000. Health officials are attributing this spike in numbers to the recent relaxation of lockdown measures and are urging the public to adhere to social distancing guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Trump fired BLS Commissioner Erika McEntarfer, who was a Biden appointee confirmed with bipartisan support, creating challenges for the next leader.
data.description: On Friday, President Donald Trump terminated BLS Commissioner Erika McEntarfer, who was appointed by Biden with strong bipartisan backing. This decision has negatively impacted BLS’s credibility and will pose significant obstacles for the individual chosen to improve its work quality.

data.title: TOM FORD unveils Black Orchid Reserve campaign starring Tilda Swinton. A collaboration promising a blend of transformation and enchantment.
data.description: In New York, the iconic TOM FORD Black Orchid Reserve campaign features Tilda Swinton, a renowned actor and artist. Swinton expresses her deep admiration for the legendary Black Orchid, stating, "It is a profound honor to be involved in this project that celebrates transformation, blurring boundaries, and magical properties, qualities that have always intrigued me." This collaboration highlights Swinton's unique persona and showcases the exclusivity of the Black Orchid Reserve. The campaign aims to emphasize rarity and enchantment, underlining Swinton's exceptional connection to the brand.

data.title: Fed may consider rate cut due to reduced concern over tariff-related inflation after EU deal.
data.description: Following President Trump's recent trade agreements, the Federal Reserve may feel less concerned about inflation caused by tariffs. This shift in perspective could potentially lead the Fed to consider a rate cut. The article suggests that the Fed's stance may be influenced by the EU tariff deal and other trade agreements made by the President.

data.title: ETH price expected to reach $5,000 by September with bullish trend, possibly reaching $5,200 within 4 weeks.
data.description: According to the latest price forecast, Ethereum (ETH) is anticipated to rise to a range of $5,000-$5,200 within the next 4 weeks. This prediction is based on Elliott Wave analysis, which indicates a potential medium-term bullish trend despite the current period of consolidation.

data.title: Everest Medicines reported RMB 446 million revenue, 48% YOY growth in H1 2025. Expects NEFECON revenue to reach RMB 1.2-1.4 billion in 2025. XERAVA revenue up 6% to RMB 143 million in H1 2025. VELSIPITY's NDA in China under review. EVER001 showed encouraging data in renal diseases. Company aims for RMB 1.6-1.8 billion revenue in 2025 and to turn operating cash flow positive in Q4. Plans to focus on core products NEFECON and VELSIPITY for growth. Multiple ongoing clinical trials show promising results. NEFECON granted full approval by China NMPA. Everest Medicines continues strategic initiatives for growth and expansion.
data.description: Everest Medicines, a biopharmaceutical company, reported RMB 446 million in revenue for the first half of 2025, a 48% year-over-year growth. They maintained a cash balance of RMB 1.6 billion. Core products NEFECON & XERAVA generated RMB 303 million & RMB 143 million respectively. NEFECON faced supply constraints but after approval of a production scale up, recorded RMB 520 million in August alone. VELSIPITY's NDA is under review in China. The company achieved a successful share placement resulting in HK$1.553 billion net proceeds. Everest aims for full-year revenue of RMB 1.6-1.8 billion and to become operating cash flow positive in Q4. They are focused on R&D efforts, including mRNA therapeutic cancer vaccine platforms. Everest also made a strategic equity investment in I-Mab enhancing its immuno-oncology therapy presence. Furthermore, specific drug milestones were highlighted such as NEFECON receiving full approval in China, US, and Europe, and EVER001 showing positive Phase 1b/2a clinical trial results. Everest aims for total peak sales exceeding RMB 25 billion globally. Their goal is to deliver innovative therapies, create long-term value, and become a leading global biopharmaceutical company.

data.title: Democratic governors considering 2028 presidential runs clash with public sector unions in their states over various issues.
data.description: Some Democratic governors potentially considering 2028 presidential bids are facing disputes with public sector unions in their states. These disagreements revolve around issues such as return-to-office protocols and the effects of the Trump administration's strict immigration enforcement measures.

data.title: Toki AI introduces AI avatar generator turning photos into lifelike videos without pre-training. Revolutionary tech in Singapore. #AI #Avatar
data.description: In an announcement from Singapore on August 29, 2025, Toki AI introduced its innovative AI avatar generator. The cutting-edge platform can convert a single photo into realistic, speaking video avatars with no need for pre-training or extra video material. This launch signifies Toki AI's goal to provide groundbreaking technology that can significantly impact the digital landscape.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems to remarket $29.0 million Finance Authority of Maine Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds.
data.description: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. has announced the commencement of the remarketing of $29.0 million in Finance Authority of Maine Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds. These bonds were originally issued in the total principal amount of $30.0 million, with $1.0 million set to be redeemed by Casella on August 1, 2025. The remaining $29.0 million of the Bonds, now termed as the "Remarketed Bonds," will be remarketed on the same date. This regional company specializes in solid waste, recycling, and resource management services and operates under the NASDAQ ticker symbol CWST.

data.title: Didn't get the crypto job? 4 common mistakes made in interviews. Recruiters suggest avoiding these to stand out.
data.description: Recruiters have highlighted a growing issue among job seekers, as they compete in a crowded market. Specifically, candidates applying for positions in the cryptocurrency industry are committing basic errors that hinder their likelihood of success. This trend is adding to the challenge of standing out among the immense pool of applicants, with professionals needing to be increasingly vigilant in their job search strategies.

data.title: Simply Solventless reports Q2 2025 gross revenue at $13.0M, EBITDA at $4.3M, and $1.0M cash flow from operations.
data.description: Simply Solventless Concentrates Ltd. announced its Q2 2025 financial results, achieving record quarterly gross revenue of $13.0 million, EBITDA of $4.3 million, adjusted EBITDA of $3.2 million, and positive cash flow from operations of $1.0 million. President and CEO Jeff Swainson emphasized profitable growth and integration of subsidiaries like Humble, ANC, and Cannmart. The company's key highlights include a 5% increase in gross revenue, reaching 43.0% gross margin, and a positive cash flow of $1.0 million. The balance sheet figures revealed a 57% increase in total assets, with $60.5 million as of June 30, 2025. SSC aims for further growth by launching new products like the Sluggers brand and expanding into key markets.

data.title: EU trade deal with US may pressure other countries to seek tariff relief; Trump's deal promises no new tariffs.
data.description: The trade deal negotiated by President Donald Trump with the European Union has the potential to accelerate action from other trade partners who seek guarantees against potential tariffs. This could influence them to expedite their efforts to secure similar agreements to avoid facing new tariffs set to be implemented next week.
